SEARCH
Package com.mimecast.robin.queue.relay

Class IpPoolSelector

java.lang.Object
com.mimecast.robin.queue.relay.IpPoolSelector
public class IpPoolSelector extends Object
Weighted round-robin IP pool selector for outbound bind address selection.

Holds per-pool counters (reset on JVM restart) and selects a bind IP from the named pool proportionally to configured weights.

Subclass and override selectPoolKey(Session) to implement domain-based or policy-based pool routing.

    • config

  • Constructor Details

    • IpPoolSelector

      public IpPoolSelector(IpPoolConfig config)
      Constructs a new IpPoolSelector with the given pool configuration.
      Parameters:
      config - IP pool configuration.

  • Method Details

    • selectPoolKey

      protected String selectPoolKey(Session session)
      Returns the pool key for a session.

      Override to implement domain-based or policy-based routing. Default: returns the name of the pool with default: true, or "default" if no such pool is configured.

      Parameters:
      session - Session instance.
      Returns:
      Pool key string.

    • selectAddress

      public String selectAddress(String poolKey)
      Selects a bind IP from the named pool using weighted round-robin.

      Given addresses [{ip:"10.0.0.1", weight:10}, {ip:"10.0.0.2", weight:5}], positions 0–9 map to 10.0.0.1 and positions 10–14 map to 10.0.0.2.

      Parameters:
      poolKey - Pool name to select from.
      Returns:
      Bind IP address, or null if no pools are configured or pool not found.
